promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active A2 control memory, as authority to reinstall thread-local boot law, or as permission to promote composite transcript rhetoric, worldstack scaffolds, legitimacy judgments, or SIM-adjacent packaging into current kernel law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because it is the last remaining early a2_feed big-doc parent from the live-ledger pool after the GPT, Grok integrated-model, and Grok/Gemini replay children were reduced.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the needed first child seam: this file is a historical composite threadsave, not one active spec, while still carrying reusable container hygiene, survivor-state enforcement lineage, evidence-gated activation, and a clean SIM evidence separation motif below worldstack and mega-suite inflation.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The GPT trigram child was used to preserve mixed-parent demotion and accepted-packet versus truth separation, the Grok integrated-model child was used to keep repair and self-disqualification above unified-model rhetoric, and the Grok/Gemini replay child was used to preserve least-noisy core extraction below replay and generated-pack inflation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the parent first needs a whole-composite operating-pattern child before isolating only the embedded Thread B lineage.
Deferred because scaffold inflation is safer to quarantine after the reusable operating core has been explicitly preserved.
Deferred because the SIM runner seam is clean but too narrow for the first child from a file whose strongest immediate lesson is composite historical packaging.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summaries already isolate the operating-pattern seam, and the comparison-anchor children provide enough bounded structure to avoid reopening raw transcript lines in this pass.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest source-class rule in the parent: the file is a large historical threadsave bundle with several embedded lineages rather than an active control surface.

candidate_items.name: STRICT_CONTAINER_HYGIENE_AND_NO_SMOOTHING_PATTERN_SURVIVES_AS_REUSABLE_LINEAGE

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the cleanest reusable packets in the parent: composite-source demotion, container hygiene, historical Thread B enforcement lineage, evidence-gated activation, SIM evidence separation, and scaffold inflation quarantine.
They remain contradiction-preserving, source-linked, and explicitly below active A2 authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain authority overreach, stale boot-law carryover, architecture inflation, transcript-rhetoric promotion, or composite-file overread rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent is valuable enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them.
